claims.text: The convolution operator is the fundamental building block of modern convolutional neural networks (CNNs).
claims.source_quote: The convolution operator is the fundamental building block of modern convolutional neural networks (CNNs)

claims.text: The convolution operator has translational equivariance.
claims.source_quote: owing to its simplicity, translational equivariance, and efficient implementation

claims.text: The convolution operator has efficient implementation.
claims.source_quote: owing to its simplicity, translational equivariance, and efficient implementation

claims.text: The convolution operator is a fixed, linear, locally-averaging operator.
claims.source_quote: its structure as a fixed, linear, locally-averaging operator

claims.text: The convolution operator's structure limits its ability to capture structured signal properties such as low-rank decompositions, adaptive basis representations, and non-uniform spatial dependencies.
claims.source_quote: its structure as a fixed, linear, locally-averaging operator limits its ability to capture structured signal properties such as low-rank decompositions, adaptive basis representations, and non-uniform spatial dependencies

claims.text: There are five families of alternative operators to standard convolution.
claims.source_quote: We organise the landscape of alternative operators into five families

claims.text: Decomposition-based operators separate structural and noise components through singular value or tensor decompositions.
claims.source_quote: decomposition-based operators, which separate structural and noise components through singular value or tensor decompositions

claims.text: Adaptive weighted operators modulate kernel contributions as a function of spatial position or signal content.
claims.source_quote: adaptive weighted operators, which modulate kernel contributions as a function of spatial position or signal content

claims.text: Basis-adaptive operators optimise the analysis bases together with the network weights.
claims.source_quote: basis-adaptive operators, which optimise the analysis bases together with the network weights

claims.text: Integral and kernel operators generalise the convolution to position-dependent and non-linear kernels.
claims.source_quote: integral and kernel operators, which generalise the convolution to position-dependent and non-linear kernels

claims.text: Attention-based operators relax the locality assumption entirely.
claims.source_quote: attention-based operators, which relax the locality assumption entirely
